sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Announces an Investigation Against Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (LFCR) and Encourages Investors to Learn More About the Investigation
feed.summary: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC has launched an investigation into potential claims against Lifecore Biomedical, Inc. (LFCR) and certain officers/directors for alleged corporate wrongdoing. The firm encourages investors who purchased Lifecore securities before October 7, 2020, and still hold them, to join the investigation. Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC represents investors on a contingency fee basis and seeks to recover investor capital and ensure corporate accountability.

feed.title: Lineage Cell Therapeutics (LCTX) price target increased by 20.00% to 5.10
feed.summary: The price target for Lineage Cell Therapeutics (LCTX) has been increased by 20.00% to $5.10. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook for the company's valuation.

feed.title: Western Digital Surged 550% Last Year and Analysts See More Upside in 2026
feed.summary: Western Digital (WDC) saw a 550% surge last year and analysts predict further upside in 2026, driven by its focus on high-density nearline drives for AI data centers. The company reported strong Q2 FY2026 earnings with EPS up 78% and gross margins expanding. WDC's UltraSMR technology and upcoming HAMR platform are key to its forecasted EBITDA and gross margin expansion, with a long-term model targeting over $20 EPS and 50%+ gross margins.

feed.title: This Live Nation Entertainment Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Monday
feed.summary: Benzinga reports on five new analyst initiations for Monday, March 30, 2026. Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) received a Market Outperform rating from Citizens, along with FuboTV (FUBO). Other initiations include TSS Inc (TSSI) with a Buy rating from Needham, Netflix Inc (NFLX) with a Market Perform from Citizens, and Opus Genetics Inc (IRD) with an Overweight rating from Cantor Fitzgerald.

feed.title: FDA Approves New High Dose Regimen of SPINRAZA® (nusinersen) for Spinal Muscular Atrophy
feed.summary: The FDA has approved a new high-dose regimen of SPINRAZA (nusinersen) for the treatment of spinal muscular atrophy (SMA). This approval is based on data from the pivotal DEVOTE study, showing significant improvements in motor function for patients, and offers a new treatment option for those with SMA. The high-dose regimen will be available in the coming weeks and is already approved in the EU, Switzerland, and Japan.

feed.title: MOR Wealth Management LLC Buys New Position in Oracle Corporation $ORCL
feed.summary: MOR Wealth Management LLC has acquired a new position in Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) during Q4, purchasing 4,676 shares valued at approximately $911,000. This comes amidst mixed market sentiment; while institutions hold 42.44% of the company, senior insiders have recently sold significant stakes. Oracle faces both positive momentum from cloud/AI growth and customer wins, as well as risks from rising credit default swap levels, legal challenges, and price target cuts.

feed.title: Wealthcare Advisory Partners LLC Acquires 2,573 Shares of Cummins Inc. $CMI
feed.summary: Wealthcare Advisory Partners LLC increased its stake in Cummins Inc. by 64.1%, purchasing 2,573 additional shares and bringing its total holdings to 6,585 shares valued at $3,361,000. This comes as Cummins reported strong Q4 earnings, beating analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue. Despite insider selling activity, institutional investors hold a significant portion of the company's stock, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $588.93.

feed.title: Aptiv: Bullish About Valuation Discount And Growth Potential (APTV)
feed.summary: The author maintains a 'Buy' rating for Aptiv, citing an appealing valuation and fresh growth opportunities in Chinese exports and physical AI. A sum-of-the-parts analysis leads to a target price of $90.60, suggesting a potential capital appreciation of over 35%. The upcoming demerger of its Electrical Distribution Systems/EDS unit into Versigent is also noted as a factor in the company's valuation.

feed.title: Private Advisory Group LLC Acquires New Position in Western Digital Corporation $WDC
feed.summary: Private Advisory Group LLC has acquired a new stake of 7,279 shares in Western Digital Corporation, valued at approximately $1.25 million, bringing institutional ownership to about 92.51%. Western Digital recently beat Q4 earnings estimates with $2.13 EPS on $3.02 billion revenue, and analysts have an average price target of $265.58, with some raising targets to $325. Despite favorable institutional activity and a strong earnings report, insiders have sold a significant amount of shares recently, and broader market concerns alongside new AI memory efficiency developments pose potential challenges.

feed.title: Private Advisory Group LLC Acquires Shares of 18,171 Albemarle Corporation $ALB
feed.summary: Private Advisory Group LLC initiated a new position in Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) during the fourth quarter, purchasing 18,171 shares valued at approximately $2.57 million. This move is part of a broader trend of high institutional ownership in Albemarle, currently at 92.87%, with several major funds increasing their stakes. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for ALB, with a target price of $170.24, reflecting positive sentiment despite recent mixed earnings results.

feed.title: Private Advisory Group LLC Invests $1.60 Million in Teradyne, Inc. $TER
feed.summary: Private Advisory Group LLC acquired a new position of 8,240 shares in Teradyne (NASDAQ:TER) during Q4, valued at approximately $1.60 million. Teradyne has reported strong quarterly results and is benefiting from AI chip-testing demand and the launch of the Photon 100 photonics test platform. Analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock, with a $273.73 average target price, although the stock's high valuation and recent profit-taking suggest potential short-term volatility.

feed.title: Coca-Cola expands Fairlife production capacity amid strong demand (KO:NYSE)
feed.summary: The Coca-Cola Company is investing up to $650 million to expand its Fairlife production capacity in Michigan. This expansion includes adding two new production lines and a 245,000 square foot facility extension at its Coopersville plant. The move is expected to create approximately 150 new jobs, responding to strong consumer demand for Fairlife products.

feed.title: Needham reiterates Buy on Netflix stock, cites price hikes
feed.summary: Needham reiterated a Buy rating and $120.00 price target on Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) following recent price hikes in the U.S. and Canada. The firm estimates these increases will add approximately $1.7 billion in incremental revenue, boosting North American growth by 300 basis points in fiscal 2026. This financial upside, along with strong ad-driven subscriber growth and high revenue per employee, supports the firm's positive outlook, although InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its fair value.

feed.title: MGM All Inclusive Las Vegas Offer Tests New Revenue And Valuation Story
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has launched an all-inclusive package on the Las Vegas Strip, bundling hotel, dining, entertainment, and parking across several properties. This initiative aims to attract value-focused visitors and keep spending within MGM's ecosystem, potentially influencing revenue allocation and offering another avenue for product experimentation beyond traditional room rates and gaming. Investors should monitor guest adoption, pricing, and management commentary to assess its impact on profitability and alignment with MGM's growth forecasts.

feed.title: 3 Dividend Stocks To Consider With Yields As High As 12.2%
feed.summary: This article identifies three dividend stocks—Banner (BANR), Coca-Cola FEMSA (KOF), and Rayonier (RYN)—that offer high yields amidst market fluctuations. It details each company's operations, dividend history, and sustainability, highlighting factors like payout ratios, earnings growth, and historical volatility. The piece serves as a guide for investors seeking stable income in a volatile market.

feed.title: Fidelity Bank opens south Charlotte branch in space vacated by PNC
feed.summary: Fidelity Bank has opened a new branch in south Charlotte at 7421 Carmel Executive Park Drive. This move fills a space previously occupied by PNC that had been vacant for nearly two years. The new branch recently held a ribbon-cutting and grand opening celebration.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher (TMO) shares up since Jim Cramer called the firm "unbelievable"
feed.summary: This article notes that shares of Thermo Fisher (TMO) have seen an increase since Jim Cramer praised the company as "unbelievable." The content provided is minimal, offering only the title and publication time. Further details about Cramer's exact comments or the extent of the share increase are not available in this snippet.

feed.title: Merck (MRK) shares up significantly since Jim Cramer advised to "stay the course"
feed.summary: Merck (MRK) shares have shown significant growth since Jim Cramer advised investors to "stay the course." The article highlights the positive performance of MRK stock, reinforcing Cramer's earlier recommendation.

feed.title: AI Models Turn Cautiously More Constructive on Knightscope (KSCP) Amid High Risk Profile
feed.summary: AI models tracked by TipRanks have shown a cautiously more constructive stance on Knightscope (KSCP), a security robot maker, despite its high-risk profile and financial distress. This shift is attributed to improving short-term technical momentum and the strategic acquisition of Event Risk LLC, which is seen as a pivot towards managed security services. However, the models still highlight the company's severe losses and significant cash burn, framing KSCP as a speculative investment dependent on successful execution of its new strategy.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Adjusts Price Target on Applied Materials to $500 From $425, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has increased its price target for Applied Materials (AMAT) to $500 from $425, while reiterating an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook for the semiconductor equipment company.

feed.title: Digital Realty Trust Closes $3.25 Billion U.S. Hyperscale Data Center Fund with Global Investors
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust has successfully closed its inaugural U.S. hyperscale data center fund, securing $3.25 billion in equity commitments from a diverse group of global institutional investors. This initiative aims to expand its PlatformDIGITAL infrastructure and enhance shareholder returns by developing data centers in major U.S. markets, with Digital Realty retaining a 20% ownership and managing operations. The company also strengthened its Strategic Private Capital team with two key hires, highlighting the growing importance of private capital in funding hyperscale expansion amid rising demand from cloud, digital transformation, and AI.

feed.title: Private Advisory Group LLC Raises Stake in Costco Wholesale Corporation $COST

This move makes Costco approximately 1.6% of the fund's portfolio, its 13th largest position. Despite insider selling activity totaling $5.27 million over the past three months, Costco reported strong quarterly results, beating EPS and revenue estimates, and maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $1,039.13.

The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $1.22, resulting in an annualized yield of 2.8%, though its dividend payout ratio is high at 135.56%.

feed.title: Atmos Energy (ATO) pushes $1.5B credit facility maturities out to 2029 and 2031
feed.summary: Atmos Energy Corporation has extended the maturities of its two $1.5 billion senior unsecured revolving credit facilities, pushing the Three Year Credit Facility to March 28, 2029, and the Five Year Credit Facility to March 28, 2031. These one-year extensions became effective on March 27, 2026, under existing Revolving Credit Agreements with Crédit Agricole acting as the Administrative Agent. This move strengthens the company's access to bank liquidity over a longer period.

feed.title: Truist Maintains Insulet Corporation (PODD) Buy Rating Despite Device Correction Announcement
feed.summary: Truist has maintained its Buy rating on Insulet Corporation (PODD) despite a recent Voluntary Device Correction announcement for its Omnipod 5 lots. The firm believes the stock's decline is overdone, given that the reported adverse events had no fatalities and are expected to have a limited financial impact, with guidance remaining unchanged. This sentiment comes after Insulet also released positive clinical findings from its EVOLUTION 2C study for an automated insulin delivery system for Type 2 diabetes.

feed.title: Vistra Corp. (VST) Rating Maintained Overweight at Morgan Stanley Amid Utility Sector Growth
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has maintained an Overweight rating on Vistra Corp. (VST), although it slightly lowered its price target from $215 to $214. This comes as the utility sector shows positive growth, with increased electricity demand and data center agreements. Vistra recently achieved investment-grade status from Fitch Ratings, highlighting its strong financial health and strategic execution.

feed.title: Jabil (JBL) Shares Up Significantly Since Jim Cramer ‘Blessed” the Firm
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (JBL), a contract manufacturing firm specializing in injector pens for weight loss drugs, has seen its shares rise significantly, including a 91% increase over the past year and 47% since Jim Cramer endorsed the company in June. Despite a recent dip following a Q4 earnings report where healthcare revenue grew but other segments showed weakness, the company's Q2 revenue and core EPS surpassed analyst estimates. Cramer remains optimistic about JBL, citing its reasonable valuation and ability to navigate tariff problems.

feed.title: Amgen (AMGN) Stock Up Since Jim Cramer Said “You Could Do a Lot Worse Than Amgen”
feed.summary: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) stock has seen significant increases, with shares up 11.9% over the past year and 24% since Jim Cramer’s positive remarks on Mad Money in June 2025. The company reported strong earnings in Q3 and Q4 2025, beating analyst expectations, driven in part by developments in its weight loss drug MariTide. Cramer, while still favoring another stock for the GLP-1 story, suggested Amgen was a good bargain after its trial results were "misunderstood."

feed.title: Regeneron Pharma (REGN) Shares Up After Jim Cramer Called It a Good Stock
feed.summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) shares have risen after Jim Cramer endorsed it as a "good stock" in March 2025. The biotechnology company, focused on weight loss drugs that preserve lean muscle, has seen significant share increases since Cramer's comments, despite a year-to-date dip. Bank of America also upgraded REGN to Buy, raising its price target to $860.

feed.title: Pfizer’s (PFE) Shares Up Since Jim Cramer Said “Pass”
feed.summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) shares have increased significantly since Jim Cramer advised passing on the stock in April 2025. The company, a major pharmaceutical player developing a once-a-month weight-loss drug, saw its shares rise 6.7% over the past year and 25% since Cramer's comments. Despite a recent dip after a Q4 earnings report, the stock has shown notable growth, driven in part by an agreement to lower drug prices under the TrumpRx initiative.

feed.summary: This page provides a seasonal chart for ABIGUXX, detailing its historical monthly performance trends. The seasonality tool helps traders identify recurring patterns and potential price movements based on past data, though it notes that these insights are not guaranteed forecasts. The chart presents average percentage performance for 2024, 2025, and 2026.

feed.title: IONR PE Ratio & Valuation, Is IONR Overvalued
feed.summary: The article provides a valuation analysis of ioneer Ltd (IONR), indicating it is currently in the "Fair zone" based on its forward P/S ratio compared to its five-year average. It details various valuation metrics such as P/B, FCF Yield, P/E, and P/S ratios, comparing them to historical averages and industry benchmarks. The analysis suggests that while some metrics imply a premium that might be unsustainable, the stock's fair value is within a specified range according to relative valuation methods.

feed.title: Kosmos Energy (LON:KOS) Reaches New 1-Year High - Here's What Happened
feed.summary: Kosmos Energy (LON:KOS) shares recently hit a new 52-week high of GBX 230. Despite this, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of GBX 215. Insider selling worth over $83.9 million has occurred in the past 90 days, though insiders still retain a significant 8.38% stake.

feed.title: Infosys Ltd Stock: A Cornerstone of India's IT Sector for North American Investors Seeking Global Tech Exposure
feed.summary: Infosys Ltd, a major Indian IT consulting and outsourcing firm, is presented as a strategic investment for North American investors seeking exposure to India's growing technology services market. The article details Infosys's business model, competitive positioning against global peers, and how it benefits from digital transformation trends and macroeconomic factors. It also addresses key risks, financial health, and what investors should monitor for future performance.

feed.title: Coca-Cola, Walmart, and Adobe show how AI is rewriting CEO succession
feed.summary: The article discusses how AI is becoming a pivotal factor in CEO succession planning at major corporations like Coca-Cola, Walmart, and Adobe. It highlights how outgoing CEOs are linking their departures to the new AI-driven era and how boards are now seeking leaders who can strategically integrate AI into core business operations and foster faster decision-making. These transitions illustrate a significant shift in corporate leadership demands, moving beyond simply discussing AI to demanding its operational implementation.

feed.title: Sysco Moves Into High-Growth Cash-And-Carry Market With Massive $29.1B Jetro Acquisition
feed.summary: Sysco Corp. (SYY) announced its acquisition of Jetro Restaurant Depot for approximately $29.1 billion, consisting of $21.6 billion in cash and 91.5 million shares of Sysco stock. This strategic move grants Sysco entry into the high-margin cash-and-carry market, targeting independent restaurants that prefer in-store purchasing. The combined entities reported nearly $100 billion in net revenue for 2025, alongside significant adjusted EBITDA and free cash flow.

feed.title: NASA's Moon Mission Plan Changes Impact Boeing's Revenue Prospects
feed.summary: NASA's decision to launch the Orion spacecraft on smaller rockets, replacing Boeing's SLS for Artemis VI and subsequent missions, will significantly reduce Boeing's expected revenue from approximately $3 billion to $110 million per mission. This change drastically cuts Boeing's potential earnings from the Artemis project, which was initially projected to be $82 billion, leading to financial strain and increased market competition from companies like SpaceX and Blue Origin. Furthermore, the necessary modifications to the Orion spacecraft for compatibility with new rockets will increase R&D costs and timelines for Boeing.

feed.title: Prologis files to develop data center outside Toronto, Canada
feed.summary: Prologis, a large industrial real estate company, has submitted two land-use change applications to build a data center and two industrial buildings in Mississauga, Ontario, a city near Toronto. The proposed 20,340 sqm (220,015 sq ft) data center would be situated on a 39-acre plot that includes portions of the historic Hustler Farm. This move reflects Prologis's ongoing expansion into the data center sector, aiming for 10GW of capacity globally over the next decade.

feed.title: Texas Finally Takes Aim At Prediction Markets
feed.summary: Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick has announced legislative charges targeting prediction markets, seeking to close "gambling loopholes" that exploit federal law to circumvent state prohibitions, especially concerning elections and events. This marks Texas's entry into the growing pushback against prediction markets by state and federal officials, even as companies like Kalshi and Polymarket continue to grow and innovate, securing new licenses and significant investments. The article highlights ongoing debates about whether prediction markets constitute gambling or commodity trading, scrutinizes insider trading allegations, and discusses the broader implications for states, regulators, and the industry.

feed.title: Vantage Wealth Purchases 7,730 Shares of Honeywell International Inc. $HON
feed.summary: Vantage Wealth increased its stake in Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) by 8.9% in the 4th quarter, acquiring an additional 7,730 shares to own a total of 94,737 shares valued at $18,482,000. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in HON. The article also provides recent analyst ratings, news impacting Honeywell, insider transaction details, and financial performance metrics for the company.

feed.title: Sysco to Buy Restaurant Depot in $29 Billion Deal
feed.summary: Sysco, the largest U.S. food distributor, has agreed to acquire family-owned Jetro Restaurant Depot for approximately $29 billion, including debt. This deal involves Sysco paying Restaurant Depot shareholders $21.6 billion in cash and 91.5 million Sysco shares. The acquisition represents a multiple of over 14 times Restaurant Depot's operating income.

feed.title: Blackstone Raises $6.3 Billion for Latest Life-Sciences Fund
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. has successfully closed its latest life-sciences fund, Blackstone Life Sciences VI, raising $6.3 billion. This fund marks the firm's largest accumulation of capital dedicated to supporting clinical trials for medical advancements and technologies. The new fund surpasses its predecessor, which secured $4.6 billion in 2020.
